sys_documentation.help: Optional - Order of precedence. The highest order that matches the conditions of the table's values will be used when opening the form. As with other ServiceNow conditions, if 2 conditions with the same order are both valid, the page, form and view displayed will be unpredictable.
sys_documentation.hint: Optional - Order of precedence. The highest order that matches the conditions of the table's values will be used when opening the form. As with other ServiceNow conditions, if 2 conditions with the same order are both valid, the page, form and view displayed will be unpredictable.
sys_documentation.label: Order
sys_documentation.name: x_153465_discovert_task_form_preferences
